title: hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. planchonianum
intro: Hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. planchonianum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. planchonianum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
